element_introduction_order.mastery_context: players choose from eight real-life high-end sports cars; Special Edition adds four additional cars
courses from North America, Europe, Asia and Australia; huge number of tracks available
player customizes number of opponents, opponent type, lap count; lowest pressure introduction to racing mechanics
computer-controlled opponents with customizable difficulty; players learn racing against AI before tournament pressure
requires frequent braking during turns; blend of realistic and arcade-style; players must adapt driving technique
series of races must be completed successfully to unlock bonus cars; introduces progression and stakes
series of 2-lap races with eight opponents; last-place finisher eliminated each race; high-pressure competitive format
customizable car paint, gear ratios, tires, spoilers; allows tuning for different track conditions and racing styles
photos, videos, technical information, company history, car development background; educational/aspirational content
human opponents via LAN, modem, serial connection, or split screen; introduces unpredictability versus AI

typical_relief_triggers: winning tournament races to unlock bonus cars
typical_tension_triggers: entering a new track unfamiliar to player
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: progressive difficulty through game mode selection (Single Race → Tournament → Knockout); players self-select entry point; realistic handling creates tension on every lap; relaxation occurs between races through customization and showcase viewing

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: car showcase provides optional aspirational/educational content; customization allows optional tuning

difficulty_curve.early_game: Single Race mode with customizable opponent count and difficulty; players establish baseline comfort with handling mechanics and track layouts
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tournament Mode introduces progression pressure; players must complete series of races against increasingly familiar opponents; customization becomes strategic
difficulty_curve.late_game: Knockout Mode provides high-stress elimination format; multiplayer racing adds unpredictability; bonus car unlocks provide long-term goals
notable_spikes: transition from Single Race to Tournament Mode (introduces series pressure and stakes)
Knockout Mode introduction (elimination format with eight opponents)
first multiplayer race (human opponent unpredictability versus AI)
difficult tracks requiring heavy braking (handling difficulty spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: tracks organized by geographic region (North America, Europe, Asia, Australia) creating diverse environmental and technical challenges; exotic populated areas provide visual interest and immersion
each real-life sports car has distinct handling characteristics requiring different braking patterns and customization approaches; gear ratios, tires, spoilers change per-car strategy
Single Race (low pressure) → Tournament (moderate pressure with progression) → Knockout (high pressure elimination); players choose entry point and can practice before higher-stakes modes
